summary: Improvements in outreach, clinical, and community-based services enhance risk detection and allow timely interventions during critical stages of fetal development, reducing rates of neonatal morbidity and mortality—the primary drivers of poor child survival. Thus, these enhancements reliably predict gains in child survival.

Thus, these enhancements reliably predict gains in child survival.. Answer choice: A
